status: 資格已取得；核准後啟動 7 年市場獨占
note: → 2015/12 取得 FDA 孤兒藥資格，核准後可享 7 年美國市場獨占＋研發稅賦優惠、PDUFA 費用豁免。目前美國尚未核准（規劃 Ph2b），故獨占尚未啟動。

en.status: Designation granted; 7-year market exclusivity starts on approval
en.note: → FDA orphan drug designation obtained in 2015/12, carrying 7 years of US market exclusivity on approval plus R&D tax credits and PDUFA fee waivers. Not yet approved in the US (Ph2b planned), so exclusivity has not started.

type: 孤兒再生醫療產品資格（2018/12）
status: 資格已取得；優先審查中（承認申請 2026/06 已送）
note: → 2018/12 獲日本孤兒再生醫療產品資格 → 優先審查（約 9 個月）＋開發補助／稅賦。2026/06 已送承認申請，最快 2027H1 取證；核准後於日本享法定獨占安排。

en.status: Designation granted; under priority review (application filed 2026/06)
en.note: → Japanese orphan regenerative medicine designation granted in 2018/12 → priority review (~9 months) plus development grants and tax relief. The marketing application was filed in 2026/06, with approval possible from H1 2027; statutory exclusivity arrangements apply in Japan once approved.

type: 孤兒藥資格 · 快速通道 · 優先審查
status: 資格已取得；市場獨占未啟動
note: → 孤兒藥資格（designation）是研發階段身分；核准後才有 7 年市場獨占。Troriluzole 已於 2025/11 收 CRL、尚未核准，故獨占權目前不存在。

en.type: Orphan designation · Fast Track · Priority Review
en.status: Designations granted; market exclusivity not started
en.note: → An orphan designation is a development-stage status; the 7-year market exclusivity only begins at approval. Troriluzole received a CRL in 2025/11 and is not approved, so no exclusivity exists today.

status: 資格已取得；MAA 審查中
note: → 歐盟孤兒藥核准後可享 10 年市場獨占；目前 MAA 仍審查中，獨占權尚未啟動。

en.note: → EU orphan approval would carry 10 years of market exclusivity; the MAA is still under review, so exclusivity has not started.

type: 孤兒藥資格（SCA；另 HD 亦獲）
status: 資格已取得；市場獨占未啟動（Ph1/2a）
note: → FDA 授予 VO659 於 SCA 及 HD 之孤兒藥資格；仍 Ph1/2a、未核准，7 年獨占尚未啟動。

en.type: Orphan designation (SCA; also granted in HD)
en.note: → FDA granted VO659 orphan designation in both SCA and HD; still Ph1/2a and unapproved, so the 7-year exclusivity has not started.

type: 孤兒藥資格（SCA；另 HD 亦獲）
status: 資格已取得；市場獨占未啟動
note: → 歐盟執委會授予 VO659 於 SCA（及 HD）孤兒藥資格；核准後可享 10 年歐盟市場獨占，目前未核准。

en.type: Orphan designation (SCA; also granted in HD)
en.note: → The European Commission granted VO659 orphan designation in SCA (and HD); approval would bring 10 years of EU market exclusivity, but it is not approved.

status: 資格已取得；市場獨占未啟動（臨床前）
note: → 2025/05/14 獲 FDA 孤兒藥資格；仍臨床前（IND 預計 2026），7 年市場獨占須待核准。非營利開發、單股 ASO、技術源自 LUMC（與 Vico 同源）。

en.note: → FDA orphan designation granted 2025/05/14; still preclinical (IND expected 2026), so the 7-year exclusivity awaits approval. Non-profit developer, single-stranded ASO, technology from LUMC (the same origin as Vico’s).

status: 公開來源未見公告（Ph1 早期）
note: → 兩次搜尋＋藥物資料庫皆未見 ARO-ATXN2 的孤兒藥資格公開公告（資料庫需登入）；屬 Ph1 早期，持續追蹤、不臆測。

en.note: → Two search passes and drug databases turned up no public orphan designation announcement for ARO-ATXN2 (databases require login). Early Ph1 — we keep tracking and do not speculate.

status: 程式中止（2023），獨占權議題已無意義
note: → 開發已於 2023 終止；即便曾有任何資格，因無上市計畫，市場獨占不再適用。

en.note: → Development ended in 2023; with no path to market, any designation that may have existed no longer translates into exclusivity.
